case_title: TAMIKA THOMPSON BURKE VS. BARNEVELD DORMAN LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKE, TAMIKA THOMPSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEVELD DORMAN LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEVELD DORMAN LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-31-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLENE MCCOLPIN, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY BURKE, TAMIKA THOMPSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEVELD DORMAN LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKE, TAMIKA THOMPSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BARNEVELD DORMAN LLC PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME TO ADD ADDITIONAL DEFENDANTS IS DENIED. PLAINTFF MAY FILE ANOTHER CLAIM LISTING SEPARATE DEFENDANTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
